instruction: In Apple Notes, create a new note titled "Quick Note" and set its content to "This is a quick note.".
reference_command:
cat > /tmp/memo_auto_add.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
file="$1"

cat > "$file" <<'TXT'
Quick Note

This is a quick note.
TXT
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/memo_auto_add.sh
EDITOR=/tmp/memo_auto_add.sh memo notes --folder "Work" --add
